nasb.text: All things are wearisome; Man is not able to tell it. The eye is not satisfied with seeing, Nor is the ear filled with hearing.

esv.text: All things are full of weariness; a man cannot utter it; the eye is not satisfied with seeing, nor the ear filled with hearing.

cnv.text: 萬事都令人厭倦， 人說，說不盡； 眼看，看不飽； 耳聽，聽不足。

ccb.text: 万事令人厌烦，人述说不尽。 眼看，看不饱； 耳听，听不够。

csbs.text: 万事令人厌倦， 人无法说尽； 眼看，看不饱； 耳听，听不足。
